Bash(npx shadcn@latest add button card input label select tabs dialog dropdown-menu avatar badge skeleton separator)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "D:\\项目\\src\\app\\api\\models\\" 2>$null; if \(-not \(Test-Path "D:\\项目\\src\\app\\api\\models"\)\) { "models directory does not exist" })
PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" auth status 2>&1; if \($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0\) { & "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" auth status 2>&1 })

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "D:\\项目\\node_modules"\) { $count = \(Get-ChildItem "D:\\项目\\node_modules" -Directory\).Count; Write-Host "node_modules packages \(directories\): $count" } else { Write-Host "no node_modules" })

PowerShell($totalSize = \(Get-ChildItem "D:\\项目" -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; $totalSizeMB = [math]::Round\($totalSize / 1MB, 1\); Write-Host "Project total size: $totalSizeMB MB")

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "D:\\项目\\node_modules"\) { $nmSize = \(Get-ChildItem "D:\\项目\\node_modules" -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; $nmSizeMB = [math]::Round\($nmSize / 1MB, 1\); Write-Host "node_modules size: $nmSizeMB MB" })
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, CommandLine | Format-Table -Wrap")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command 'Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '\\''*bg-replace*'\\'' -or $_.Id -eq \(Get-Content '\\''.next/dev/logs/next-development.log'\\'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-String '\\''PID:'\\'' | Select-Object -First 1\) } | Stop-Process -Force')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['name'], t['thumbnailUrl']\) for t in data['data']]")
PowerShell(if \($env:REMOVEBG_API_KEY\) { Write-Host "REMOVEBG_API_KEY is set \(length: $\($env:REMOVEBG_API_KEY.Length\)\)" } else { Write-Host "REMOVEBG_API_KEY is NOT set" })

PowerShell(npx tsx -e "import 'dotenv/config';import{PrismaClient} from '@prisma/client';import{PrismaPg} from '@prisma/adapter-pg';const p=new PrismaClient\({adapter:new PrismaPg\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL!}\)}\);const tasks=await p.bgReplaceTask.findMany\({where:{status:'done'},orderBy:{createdAt:'desc'},take:10,include:{results:true}}\);for\(const t of tasks\){console.log\(t.id,t.createdAt.toISOString\(\).substring\(0,19\),t.status,t.results.length+' results'\);}await p.\\$disconnect\(\);")

PowerShell(npx tsx -e "import 'dotenv/config';import{PrismaClient} from '@prisma/client';import{PrismaPg} from '@prisma/adapter-pg';const p=new PrismaClient\({adapter:new PrismaPg\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL!}\)}\);const t=await p.bgReplaceTask.findUnique\({where:{id:'cmp3z0qor0000novdniliv062'},include:{results:{take:1}}}\);console.log\('https://ai-generate-two.vercel.app/api/s3/'+t.results[0].resultKey+'?v=2'\);await p['$disconnect']\(\);")

PowerShell(npx tsx -e "import 'dotenv/config';import{PrismaClient} from '@prisma/client';import{PrismaPg} from '@prisma/adapter-pg';const p=new PrismaClient\({adapter:new PrismaPg\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL!}\)}\);const t=await p.backgroundTemplate.findFirst\({where:{name:'白墙-明亮'}}\);console.log\('fileUrl:',t?.fileUrl\);console.log\('thumbnailUrl:',t?.thumbnailUrl\);await p['\\$disconnect']\(\);")

PowerShell(npx tsx -e "import 'dotenv/config';import{PrismaClient} from '@prisma/client';import{PrismaPg} from '@prisma/adapter-pg';const p=new PrismaClient\({adapter:new PrismaPg\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL!}\)}\);const r=await p.bgReplaceResult.findUnique\({where:{id:'cmp3z0qsw0001novdqk012x0z'}}\);console.log\('Result status:',r?.status\);console.log\('Error:',r?.error||'none'\);console.log\('Result key:',r?.resultKey\);await p['\\$disconnect']\(\);")

PowerShell(npx tsx --% -e "import 'dotenv/config';import{PrismaClient} from '@prisma/client';import{PrismaPg} from '@prisma/adapter-pg';async function main\(\){const p=new PrismaClient\({adapter:new PrismaPg\({connectionString:process.env.DATABASE_URL!}\)}\);const t=await p.bgReplaceTask.findUnique\({where:{id:'cmp41387y0000wkvdl26p95to'},include:{results:true}}\);console.log\('Status:',t?.status\);for\(const r of t?.results||[]\){console.log\(r.id,r.status,r.resultKey?.substring\(0,50\)||'null'\)}await p['$disconnect']\(\)}main\(\)")
PowerShell(if \($env:REPLICATE_API_TOKEN\) { Write-Host "REPLICATE_API_TOKEN locally: YES \(len: $\($env:REPLICATE_API_TOKEN.Length\)\)" } else { Write-Host "REPLICATE_API_TOKEN locally: NOT SET" })
